'''âg-zh-t-sh''' ('''kagazhteshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:womance|womance]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-t-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:womance|womance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-zh-t-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kagazhteshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigazhteshoko|thigazhteshoko]] || [[word:jigazhteshoko|jigazhteshoko]] || [[word:shigazhteshoko|shigazhteshoko]] || [[word:kigazhteshoko|kigazhteshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugazhteshoko|thuthugazhteshoko]] || [[word:jujugazhteshoko|jujugazhteshoko]] || [[word:shushugazhteshoko|shushugazhteshoko]] || [[word:kukugazhteshoko|kukugazhteshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogazhteshoko|thogazhteshoko]] || [[word:jogazhteshoko|jogazhteshoko]] || [[word:shogazhteshoko|shogazhteshoko]] || [[word:kogazhteshoko|kogazhteshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgazhteshoko|thĂŠgazhteshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠgazhteshoko|jĂŠgazhteshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠgazhteshoko|shĂŠgazhteshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠgazhteshoko|kĂŠgazhteshoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
